personalInfo.name: Ali Burhan
personalInfo.description: Full Stack Developer with 2+ years of experience building scalable cloud applications, AI-powered solutions, and microservices platforms using JavaScript (React, Next.js, Node.js), Python, and AWS cloud services. Specialized in serverless architectures (AWS Lambda, API Gateway, CloudFront), LLM integration (LangChain, RAG), and Infrastructure as Code with Terraform.

projects.name: Forwood Safety
projects.description: Built and maintained a microservices safety platform deployed across 1,000+ sites globally using Python serverless architecture, reducing infrastructure costs by 30%.
achievements: Built microservices safety platform using Python serverless architecture (AWS Lambda, API Gateway, SQS, Kinesis) deployed across 1,000+ sites globally, reducing infrastructure costs by 30%

Spearheaded backend architecture for Safety+ mobile app and automated infrastructure with Terraform, cutting deployment time from 2 hours to 15 minutes across dev, staging, and production environments
Implemented E2E testing suite using Pytest, automating user login flows, API endpoint validation, and regression checks, reducing post-release defects by 25%
Served as Release Manager coordinating quarterly releases and hotfixes via Jira and Jenkins pipelines, maintaining 99.9% platform uptime with zero-downtime deployments

projects.name: Lumaya
projects.description: Architected and delivered a full-stack business marketplace as sole developer in 4 months, 50+ listings worth $10M+ total value, from requirements through production.
achievements: Architected and delivered full-stack business marketplace (lumaya.ch) as sole developer in 4 months, 50+ listings worth $10M+ total value, from requirements through production
Integrated Veriff KYC for identity verification (100+ verifications, 95% success rate) and real-time WebSocket chat with file attachments and read receipts
Deployed on AWS Lightsail managing PostgreSQL optimization, SSL, and production environment with 99.8% uptime

projects.name: CazVid
projects.description: Built 25+ frontend components for an AI-driven job board serving 150+ languages globally, integrating 20+ RESTful APIs with NestJS/MongoDB backend.
achievements: Built 25+ frontend components for AI-driven job board serving 150+ languages globally, integrating 20+ RESTful APIs with NestJS/MongoDB backend for real-time AI resume screening and automated job matching
Developed Kanban recruiter dashboard with React DnD managing 500+ postings and optimized performance by 40% via code splitting and lazy loading, improving Core Web Vitals

freelanceProjects.name: Emotion-Aware Multilingual Voice Processing System
freelanceProjects.description: Designed an end-to-end voice processing pipeline that records audio, detects emotional tone, performs Speech-to-Text, translates bidirectionally (EN ↔ ES), and generates emotion-preserving TTS output.
achievements: Designed end-to-end voice processing pipeline recording audio, detecting emotional tone via OpenSmile, Speech-to-Text with Deepgram, bidirectional translation (EN ↔ ES) via DeepL, and emotion-preserving TTS using ElevenLabs API
Built RESTful APIs with FastAPI orchestrating all service communication with structured error handling and fault tolerance across the full pipeline

freelanceProjects.name: TeachTrack AI
freelanceProjects.description: Built an AI-powered educational platform automating test creation and grading for 500+ monthly assessments across 3 schools, serving 1,200+ students and 45+ teachers.
achievements: Built AI-powered educational platform automating test creation and grading for 500+ monthly assessments across 3 schools, serving 1,200+ students and 45+ teachers
Engineered GPT-4 test generator with custom prompt templates reducing teacher prep time by 70%, and automated grader achieving 92% accuracy vs. manual grading
Integrated LangChain RAG with vector embeddings for curriculum-based question generation from 1,000+ pages of educational materials

education.institution: NFC Institute of Engineering and Fertilizer Research
